name: Karate Champ
description: Karate Champ is a 2D head-to-head fighting game where two karatekas face off in a dojo. The core gameplay revolves around performing a variety of karate moves to score points. Each match consists of rounds, and the first player to achieve a set number of points, typically two, wins the round. Points are awarded for successful attacks, with more complex or risky moves yielding higher scores. The characters are represented as male karatekas wearing white uniforms. The game features a referee who announces the start and end of the rounds, as well as point awards. The environment consists of a traditional Japanese dojo setting.
